answer:
Meta's Marketing API is free to access, with no per-call or usage-based fees charged by Meta [1][2]. Costs are instead incurred through your own infrastructure, maintenance, and developer time [1].

Access is tiered based on rate limits [1][3]:

Development Access is the default for new apps, offering 60 quota points per 300-second window, suitable only for testing [3]. 
Standard Access provides 9,000 points and supports production workflows for accounts you own or manage [3][4].
Advanced (or Full) Access offers enterprise-level quotas for applications serving third-party advertisers [1][3].

To upgrade beyond Development Access, you must complete Meta's App Review process, which requires business verification and a demonstration of your use case [3][5].
